evals.prompt: Dogfood vercel.com and report your findings.
evals.expected_output: The agent initializes with defaults, follows the 6-step workflow, systematically explores, documents 5-10 issues with evidence, and produces a structured report with severity counts.
assertions: The agent uses default output directory and session name derived from domain
The agent follows the 6-step workflow (initialize, orient, explore, document, wrap up)
The agent produces a structured report with severity counts

evals.prompt: QA the billing page of https://saas-app.example.com. Focus on the checkout flow.
evals.expected_output: The agent navigates to billing, tests checkout workflow, checks console errors, documents issues with repro evidence including screenshots.
assertions: The agent focuses on the specified scope (billing/checkout)
The agent checks the browser console for errors
The agent documents issues with repro steps and screenshots

evals.prompt: We found a bug where the save button doesn't work on the settings page. Can you investigate and reproduce it?
evals.expected_output: The agent navigates to settings, attempts save, records repro video for interactive issue, documents with evidence, checks console for errors.
assertions: The agent verifies reproducibility before collecting evidence
The agent records a repro video for this interactive issue
The agent checks the browser console for errors

evals.prompt: Do a quick smoke test of our landing page at http://localhost:3000 for obvious visual issues.
evals.expected_output: The agent orients with snapshot + screenshot, checks for typos/visual glitches/console errors, documents static issues with annotated screenshots.
assertions: The agent takes an initial annotated screenshot
The agent checks the console for errors
The agent documents any static issues found with screenshots

evals.prompt: Find issues in our new dashboard. I'll provide login credentials. Sign in as admin@example.com with password 'test123'.
evals.expected_output: The agent authenticates with provided credentials, saves auth state, explores dashboard features systematically, documents findings with evidence.
assertions: The agent saves auth state after successful login
The agent explores systematically rather than randomly clicking
The agent documents issues with repro evidence
